response.justification: While Bogdan brings 15+ years of software engineering and documented performance optimization expertise, this Principal role requires core competencies in hardware: SoC design, GPU architecture, and AI accelerator optimization. His background is entirely software-focused with no SoC modeling, IP integration, or hardware co-design experience—skills fundamental to the role.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering with proven performance optimization expertise in low-latency, high-throughput systems
Strong systems-thinking and architectural decision-making across diverse domains and technology stacks
Demonstrated mentoring ability and knowledge-sharing through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: No SoC modeling, IP architecture, or hardware design experience despite these being core job responsibilities
Complete absence of GPU architecture or deep-learning accelerator optimization background
Purely software engineering background with no evidence of hardware-software co-design or semiconductor industry experience
